actionUnits.condition: GameObject has BoxCollider (no Rigidbody), so Trigger is allowed. Attached MonoBehaviour (GUID: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) matches the provided Fire script and uses exact serialized settings from scene (debug=0, isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, totalHitTime=5, onNeighborsThreshold=2, mainEffectGo=1849464941111748095, neighbors=[]). However, this Fire script exposes no public parameterless methods (NotifyNeighborState(bool), UpdateFireState(bool), WaterHit(Vector3), SetIsOn(bool), FindNeighbors(Fire[],int) all require parameters), and there are no UnityEvents (m_Calls) listed for this object. This Trigger step interacts with the collider to exercise Awake/Update lifecycles but cannot directly invoke script methods. To achieve full coverage we will need either: (1) a parameterless wrapper method or UnityEvent to call WaterHit/SetIsOn/UpdateFireState, (2) populated neighbors or a controller that calls FindNeighbors/NotifyNeighborState, or (3) details of the water system that invokes IWaterInteractable.WaterHit.
